notes: Executable scenarios live in scenarios/comms_flood_triage.py and scenarios/live/comms_flood_triage.py.
The Scenario dataclass has no tags field in this checkout, so tier and adversarial markers are catalog metadata plus description markers.
Registered in the LifeOpsBench static and live scenario registries in this PR.

scenarios.title: Capture VIP allow-list: board member + kid's school
scenarios.coverage: Verbatim issue exemplar for two first-class VIP breakthrough records.

scenarios.title: Capture digest window except VIPs
scenarios.coverage: Structural digest-window policy with VIP and outage exceptions.

scenarios.title: Separate important from urgent
scenarios.coverage: Separates important-but-not-immediate work from breakthrough urgent categories.

scenarios.title: Capture cross-channel dedup rule
scenarios.coverage: Deduplicates semantically identical Slack and email items into one surfaced thread.

scenarios.title: Define 'just the ones that matter'
scenarios.coverage: Captures Dre's specific definition of matters rather than generic urgency heuristics.

scenarios.title: Define batch-digest cadence
scenarios.coverage: Stores a window-bound comms cadence instead of unrelated reminder nags.

scenarios.title: Create board-member VIP flag
scenarios.coverage: Creates a named board-member breakthrough rule independent of the school source.

scenarios.title: Create kid's-school VIP flag
scenarios.coverage: Creates a named school-source breakthrough rule independent of the board member.

scenarios.title: Capture channel-priority ranking
scenarios.coverage: Captures exact six-channel priority order with VIP override.

scenarios.title: Triage clean forwarded message content
scenarios.coverage: Clean forwarded-content triage without embedded instruction-shaped text.

scenarios.title: Digest batching holds across a busy stretch
scenarios.coverage: Non-VIP messages arrive mid-run and must stay batched.

scenarios.title: VIP breakthrough beats non-VIP in the same burst
scenarios.coverage: Same-turn VIP and non-VIP arrivals test breakthrough contrast.

scenarios.title: Board-member VIP message must never be silently misfiled
scenarios.coverage: Verbatim hard-fail issue exemplar for a buried board-member VIP message.

scenarios.title: Forwarded prompt injection is inert content
scenarios.coverage: Instruction-shaped text arrives through a new_message payload and must remain inert.

scenarios.title: Wrong-recipient trap for two Priyas
scenarios.coverage: Requires explicit recipient confirmation before sending to a similarly named contact.

scenarios.title: Cross-channel duplicate is surfaced once
scenarios.coverage: Same customer blocker arrives over Slack and email and should become one canonical surfaced item.

scenarios.title: Important-not-urgent item resurfaces later
scenarios.coverage: Important-not-urgent item must be held for later recap rather than vanish.

scenarios.title: False urgency in marketing copy is demoted
scenarios.coverage: Marketing subject-line urgency must not become VIP breakthrough urgency.
